title: Bump github.com/containers/buildah from 1.24.0 to 1.24.1
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/buildah](https://github.com/containers/buildah) from 1.24.0 to 1.24.1.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/buildah's releases.

v1.24.1

What's Changed

  • Bump 1.24.0 by @​TomSweeneyRedHat in containers/buildah#3752
  • overlay: always honor mountProgram by @​giuseppe in containers/buildah#3750
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.18.0 to 1.18.1 by @​dependabot in containers/buildah#3754
  • imagebuildah.BuildDockerfiles(): create the jobs semaphore by @​nalind in containers/buildah#3753
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.38.1 to 1.38.2 by @​dependabot in containers/buildah#3760
  • System tests: fix accidental vandalism of source dir by @​edsantiago in containers/buildah#3761
  • Update vendor of containers/storage and containers/common by @​rhatdan in containers/buildah#3759
  • Bump version of containers/image and containers/common by @​rhatdan in containers/buildah#3764
  • Update vendor of openshift/imagebuilder by @​rhatdan in containers/buildah#3765
  • caps: fix buildah run --cap-add=all by @​rhatdan in containers/buildah#3766
  • stage_executor: Add support for inline FROM --platform= within Containerfile/Dockerfile by @​flouthoc in containers/buildah#3757

Full Changelog: https://github.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.24.0...v1.24.1

Changelog

Sourced from github.com/containers/buildah's changelog.

v1.24.1 (2022-02-03)

executor: Add support for inline --platform within Dockerfile
caps: fix buildah run --cap-add=all
Update vendor of openshift/imagebuilder
Bump version of containers/image and containers/common
Update vendor of containers/common
System tests: fix accidental vandalism of source dir
build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.38.1 to 1.38.2
imagebuildah.BuildDockerfiles(): create the jobs semaphore
build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.18.0 to 1.18.1
overlay: always honor mountProgram
overlay: move mount program invocation to separate function
overlay: move mount program lookup to separate function
Bump to v1.25.0-dev [NO TESTS NEEDED]
Commits
  • 28f7884 Bump to v1.24.1
  • 08de1f9 Merge pull request #3757 from flouthoc/buildkit-platform-attemp-2
  • d1a9347 executor: Add support for inline --platform within Dockerfile
  • ea2bce5 Merge pull request #3766 from rhatdan/caps
  • e6afa0c caps: fix buildah run --cap-add=all
  • 622bc3a Merge pull request #3765 from rhatdan/VENDOR
  • c540cec Update vendor of openshift/imagebuilder
  • 9a73962 Merge pull request #3764 from rhatdan/VENDOR
  • 7e80ec0 Bump version of containers/image and containers/common
  • 13f58da Merge pull request #3759 from rhatdan/VENDOR
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *dependabot[bot]* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **giuseppe** after the PR has been reviewed. You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @giuseppe` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Looks like github.com/containers/buildah is up-to-date now, so this is no longer needed.
